title: pelargonium × magnifolium
intro: Pelargonium × magnifolium, also known as the  mountain rose or Cape rose, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the geranium family (Geraniaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds such as linalool, geraniol, and citronellal, exhibiting antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pelargonium × magnifolium include relief from stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu due to its decongestant properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
